headline: Veoneer To Begin Discussions with Qualcomm On Takeover Bid
summary: Veoneer Inc. (NYSE: VNE) has announced plans to begin discussions with Qualcomm Inc. (NASDAQ: QCOM) after the chipmaker issued a $4.6 billion takeover bid.

headline: Tesla to Require Masks for Workers, Guests at Nevada Battery Plant Starting Monday
Tesla's Cybertruck Deliveries Delayed to 2022
summary: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) has quietly confirmed a delay in deliveries of the much-awaited Cybertruck, its all-electric pick-up truck.

headline: What to Expect From Tesla's AI Day Scheduled for Aug. 19
summary: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) is scheduled to host its AI Day Aug.19, and the EV maker began sending invites  for the event last week.

headline: Marqeta IPO Preview: The Thing Behind The Thing Providing Payment Cards For Large Customers
summary: Benzinga routinely examines a stock that might be considered a little under the radar. The company may not be well-known, but chances are the line of work it’s in is pretty familiar. This is called the “thing behind the thing.”
